assassin_opening.name: Assassin Opening
assassin_opening.description: Setup/Builder: A surgical strike that exposes the foe's weakness. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Kill Pip.

toxic_blade.name: Toxic Blade
toxic_blade.description: Setup: Coat your blade in neurotoxins. Generates 1 Kill Pip and applies [Toxic].

death_stroke.name: Death Stroke
death_stroke.description: Payoff: A final, quiet puncture. Consumes 5 Kill Pips to deal massive Physical damage. Multiplier is doubled if target is below 40% HP.

throat_slit.name: Throat Slit
throat_slit.description: Payoff: Silence the target with a surgical cut. Consumes 3 Kill Pips to deal high damage and apply [Silenced].

smoke_screen.name: Smoke Screen
smoke_screen.description: Defense: A cloud of dense smoke. Grants [Concealed] to self and blinds all enemies in the room.

evasive_maneuver.name: Evasive Maneuver
evasive_maneuver.description: Defense: Focus on pure agility. Increases Evasiveness by 50% for 4 ticks.

assassin_jump.name: Assassin Jump
assassin_jump.description: Mobility: Leap across obstacles with cold precision.

killer_instinct.name: Killer Instinct
killer_instinct.description: Utility/Signature: Tap into pure lethal focus. Every strike for 10 ticks has a 50% chance to generate an extra Kill Pip.

assassin_physiology.name: Assassin Physiology
assassin_physiology.description: Passive: Silent Death. You gain 20% increased damage from behind and 15% bonus movement speed while [Concealed].
